name: Dragonfire Adept
description: A new base class that channels draconic power through breath weapons and invocations, emulating the abilities of dragons without being spellcasters.

name: Barbarian
description: A fierce warrior of primitive background who can enter a battle rage.

name: Bard
description: A performer whose music works magic, and a jack-of-all-trades.

name: Cleric
description: A divine spellcaster who channels the power of a deity.

name: Druid
description: A divine spellcaster who draws power from nature and can wild shape.

name: Fighter
description: A master of combat, skilled with a variety of weapons and armor.

name: Incarnate
description: Incarnates are divine champions who channel the power of alignments through incarnum. They embody one alignment extreme (good, evil, law, or chaos) and can manipulate incarnum to create soulmelds that reflect their chosen ideal. Incarnates serve both a melee role and a supporting role through aligned auras and soulmelds.

specialAbilities.name: Aligned Meldshaper
specialAbilities.description: Must choose one alignment component (good, evil, law, or chaos). Can only be neutral good, neutral evil, lawful neutral, or chaotic neutral. This choice affects soulmelds and class abilities.

specialAbilities.name: Soulmelds
specialAbilities.description: Can shape incarnum into soulmelds. Number of soulmelds shaped is limited by class level and Constitution score (max soulmelds = Constitution - 10).

specialAbilities.name: Chakra Binds
specialAbilities.description: Can bind soulmelds to chakras to gain enhanced effects. Binds unlock at various levels: crown/feet/hands (least) at 3rd, arms/brow/shoulders (lesser) at 10th, throat/waist (greater) at 14th.

specialAbilities.name: Incarnum Radiance
specialAbilities.description: Can project an aura based on alignment choice that affects allies and enemies within range.

specialAbilities.name: Detect Opposition
specialAbilities.description: Can detect the opposing alignment (opposite of chosen alignment) at will as a spell-like ability.

name: Monk
description: A martial artist whose unarmed strikes are as powerful as weapons.

name: Paladin
description: A champion of justice and destroyer of evil, protected and strengthened by divine power.

name: Psion
description: A master of the mind who draws power from strict mental discipline. Psions specialize in one of six disciplines: Clairsentience (Seers), Metacreativity (Shapers), Psychokinesis (Kineticists), Psychometabolism (Egoists), Psychoportation (Nomads), or Telepathy (Telepaths).
specialAbilities: Power Points/Day: Base power points plus bonus from high Intelligence
Discipline: Choose one psionic discipline at 1st level (Clairsentience, Metacreativity, Psychokinesis, Psychometabolism, Psychoportation, or Telepathy)
Powers Known: Starts with 3 psion powers, gains more with each level
Bonus Feats: Gains bonus psionic feats at 1st, 5th, 10th, 15th, and 20th level

disciplines.name: Seer (Clairsentience)
disciplines.description: Masters of precognitive powers and information gathering

disciplines.name: Shaper (Metacreativity)
disciplines.description: Creators of ectoplasmic constructs and matter from the Astral Plane

disciplines.name: Kineticist (Psychokinesis)
disciplines.description: Masters of matter and energy manipulation, devastating energy blasts

disciplines.name: Egoist (Psychometabolism)
disciplines.description: Specialists in altering psychobiology, can heal and transform themselves

disciplines.name: Nomad (Psychoportation)
disciplines.description: Wielders of powers that propel or displace objects in space and time

disciplines.name: Telepath (Telepathy)
disciplines.description: Masters of mental contact and control, can deceive or destroy minds

name: Psychic Warrior
description: A warrior who combines combat skill with psionic powers. The psychic warrior supplements physical attacks with psionic feats and abilities, achieving a balance between martial prowess and mental might.
specialAbilities: Power Points/Day: Base power points plus bonus from high Wisdom
Powers Known: Starts with 1 power, gains more with each level
Bonus Feats: Gains bonus combat-oriented feats at 1st, 2nd, 5th, 8th, 11th, 14th, 17th, and 20th level (can choose from fighter bonus feats or psionic feats)

name: Ranger
description: A skilled woodsman and tracker who defends the wilderness.

name: Rogue
description: A skilled thief and scout, master of stealth and deception.

name: Sorcerer
description: A spellcaster who draws on inherent magic from a gift or bloodline.

name: Soulborn
description: Soulborn are warrior-priests who blend martial prowess with the power of incarnum. They are devoted champions who shape soulmelds to enhance their combat abilities and smite their foes. Soulborn channel their alignment ideals into physical manifestations of power.

specialAbilities.name: Aligned Meldshaper
specialAbilities.description: Must choose one alignment component (good, evil, law, or chaos). Alignment restriction: neutral good, neutral evil, lawful neutral, or chaotic neutral.

specialAbilities.name: Soulmelds
specialAbilities.description: Can shape soulborn soulmelds. Number of soulmelds is limited by Constitution score and class level.

specialAbilities.name: Smite Opposition
specialAbilities.description: Can smite creatures of opposing alignment, dealing extra damage based on soulborn level.

specialAbilities.name: Chakra Binds
specialAbilities.description: Can bind soulmelds to chakras: crown/feet/hands at 4th, arms/brow/shoulders at 11th, throat/waist at 18th.

name: Soulknife
description: A warrior who forges mental strength into a shimmering blade of semisolid psychic energy called a mind blade. Each mind blade is unique in color and shape, reflecting the soulknife's personality and mental strength.
specialAbilities: Mind Blade (Su): Create a semisolid blade of psychic energy as a move action (functions as short sword, improved at higher levels)
Weapon Focus (Mind Blade): Bonus feat at 1st level
Wild Talent: Bonus feat providing psionic power
Throw Mind Blade (Ex): Can throw mind blade as ranged weapon at 2nd level
Psychic Strike (Su): Imbue mind blade with extra 1d8 damage at 3rd level (scales with level)
Free Draw (Su): Materialize mind blade as free action at 5th level
Shape Mind Blade (Su): Change mind blade form or split into two at 5th level
Mind Blade Enhancement (Su): Add weapon special abilities starting at 6th level
Speed of Thought: Bonus feat at 6th level
Bladewind (Su): Fragment mind blade to attack all nearby opponents at 9th level
Greater Weapon Focus (Mind Blade): Bonus feat at 9th level
Knife to the Soul (Su): Deal ability damage instead of extra dice at 13th level
Multiple Throw (Ex): Throw multiple mind blades per round at 17th level

name: Totemist
description: Totemists are primal warriors who channel the souls of magical beasts and monstrous creatures through incarnum. They shape soulmelds based on creature totems, gaining animalistic and monstrous abilities. Totemists have a unique totem chakra that grants powerful bestial transformations.

specialAbilities.name: Soulmelds
specialAbilities.description: Can shape totemist soulmelds based on magical beasts and monsters. Number limited by Constitution score and class level.

specialAbilities.name: Totem Chakra
specialAbilities.description: Has access to the unique totem chakra which can be used to bind soulmelds for powerful creature-based transformations.

specialAbilities.name: Chakra Binds
specialAbilities.description: Can bind soulmelds to chakras: totem/crown/feet/hands at 1st, arms/brow/shoulders at 10th, throat/waist at 15th.

specialAbilities.name: Wild Empathy
specialAbilities.description: Can improve the attitude of animals, similar to the druid ability.

name: Wilder
description: A passionate, reckless psionic character who wields uncontrolled raw psionic power through emotion rather than discipline. Wilders can push their powers beyond normal limits through wild surges.
specialAbilities: Power Points/Day: Base power points plus bonus from high Charisma
Powers Known: Starts with 1 power, gains more with each level
Wild Surge: Can boost manifester level by +1 to +4 (with risk of enervation)
Psychic Enervation: Temporary power loss if wild surge roll is 1
Elude Touch (Ex): Add Charisma bonus to AC at 2nd level
Surging Euphoria: Bonus on attack and damage rolls for 1 round after successful wild surge at 3rd level
Volatile Mind: Gain power resistance at 5th level (improves with level)

name: Wizard
description: A powerful arcane spellcaster who studies magical arts.

name: Factotum
description: A jack-of-all-trades with the ability to mimic class abilities and spells through inspiration points.

name: Crusader
description: A martial adept who combines combat prowess with divine fervor, wielding maneuvers from the Devoted Spirit and Stone Dragon disciplines.
